mapper.sql: id, role, email, email_verified_at, name, password, otp, otp_expires_at, otp_attempts, profile_image, remember_token, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (role, email, email_verified_at, name, password, otp, otp_expires_at, otp_attempts, profile_image, remember_token) VALUES (#{role}, #{email}, #{emailVerifiedAt}, #{name}, #{password}, #{otp}, #{otpExpiresAt}, #{otpAttempts}, #{profileImage}, #{rememberToken})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET otp = #{otp}, otp_expires_at = #{otpExpiresAt}, otp_attempts = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET otp_attempts = otp_attempts + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET otp = NULL, otp_expires_at = NULL, otp_attempts = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, email_verified_at = NOW(), otp = NULL, otp_expires_at = NULL, otp_attempts = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET profile_image = #{profileImage} WHERE id = #{id}

where.if: ( id = #{numericId} OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = #{role}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
